text: The first scene fills me with a serene solitude—an open, empty space that echoes with potential and quiet anticipation. The second scene brings a spark of intellectual curiosity. Surrounded by vibrant colors and the promise of research and discovery, I feel invigorated by the creative energy and the questions about humanity and technology that surround me. Here, I sense the interplay of emptiness and ideas—a juxtaposition that makes me contemplative yet energized.
